sources.title: Treasury/IRS final regulations listing tipped occupations (IR-2026-49; Fed. Reg. 2026-07104)

IRS tax inflation adjustments for 2026 (Rev. Proc. 2025-32)
RSM — final rules confirm qualifying occupations & tip definition (FICA unaffected)
IRS — Underpayment of estimated tax penalty (safe harbor 90/100/110%)
IRS — 2026 Form 1040-ES estimated tax due dates
IRS Pub 501 (2025) / Rev. Proc. — standard deduction (OBBBA)
SSA — 2026 Social Security wage base $184,500; SE tax 15.3% (12.4%+2.9%)
